requirements: Plot all three centered five-year rolling anomaly series.
Include a zero-anomaly reference line.
Include a legend identifying all three series.
Label the time and anomaly axes, including degrees Celsius.
Keep the supplied ascending region order.
Directly label every bar with its percentage.
Label and format the value axis as percent of population.
Draw one box plot per species in the order Adelie, Chinstrap, Gentoo.
Overlay all supplied observations.
Label the species and body-mass axes, including grams.
Preserve the supplied row and column order.
Display the complete correlation matrix on a common scale from -1 to 1 centered at zero.
Include a colour bar labeled as Pearson correlation.
Keep every row and column variable label visible.
Plot every supplied vehicle's weight against fuel economy.
Group points by origin and include a legend identifying USA, Europe, and Japan.
Do not add a fitted or trend line.
Label the axes, including pounds and miles per gallon.
Use 0.1-magnitude bins beginning at 5.0 and covering the observed maximum.
Normalize bar heights to percentage of all supplied events.
Label the axes as magnitude and percentage of events.
